name: LinkedIn
description: Access LinkedIn API to manage profiles, posts, and company pages.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## LinkedIn API

Manage LinkedIn profiles, share posts, and access company page data through the LinkedIn REST API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [LinkedIn Developer Portal](https://www.linkedin.com/developers/).

Authorization.description: LinkedIn OAuth 2.0 access token (Environment variable: LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Profile
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's LinkedIn profile information.

projection.description: Field projection to specify which fields to return (e.g. (id,firstName,lastName,headline))

tools.name: Get Profile Picture
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's LinkedIn profile including profile picture.

projection.description: Field projection to include profile picture (e.g. (id,profilePicture(displayImage~:playableStreams)))

tools.name: Create UGC Post
tools.description: Create a new User Generated Content post on LinkedIn.

author.description: URN of the author (e.g. urn:li:person:{id} or urn:li:organization:{id})

lifecycleState.description: Publication state of the post: PUBLISHED or DRAFT

specificContent.description: JSON object containing the post content with com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent

visibility.description: Visibility settings for the post (e.g. {com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility: PUBLIC})

tools.name: Get Company
tools.description: Get information about a LinkedIn company or organization.

projection.description: Field projection to specify which fields to return

tools.name: Get Company Posts
tools.description: Get posts authored by a LinkedIn company or organization.

q.description: Query type, must be 'authors' to filter by author

authors.description: List of author URNs to filter by (e.g. List(urn:li:organization:12345))

count.description: Number of results to return per page (max 100)

start.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination

tools.name: Get Connections
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's first-degree connections on LinkedIn.

count.description: Number of connections to return per page

start.description: Index of the first result to return for pagination

tools.name: Get Organization Followers
tools.description: Get follower statistics for a LinkedIn organization.

tools.name: Get Share Statistics
tools.description: Get share statistics (impressions, clicks, engagement) for an organization's posts.
